big_day_dependency.note: Need at least 3 closed trades to remove both best and worst trades.

evidence_warning: This pilot evidence is under-sampled and must not be treated as strategy acceptance.

pnl_model.implementable_pnl: Entry uses configured fill_model; exit liquidates longs at bid and shorts at ask; fees are subtracted.
pnl_model.mid_pnl: Entry and exit at mid price, with no fees; comparison control only.

sample_adequacy.power_note: Point Sharpe is diagnostic only until MinTRL/PSR are calculated on an experiment return distribution.
